title: Qareach #7143
definition:
Kareah = "bald"

 1) father of Johanan and Jonathan who supported Gedaliah's authority
    and avenged his murder
nasbUsage:
Definition: Kareah = "bald"

 1) father of Johanan and Jonathan who supported Gedaliah's authority
    and avenged his murder

    NASB:  bald one, a man of Judah
